title: Global Map Services
excerpt: A curated directory of global web mapping services you can stream directly into QGIS, ArcGIS Pro, and web maps — organized by category.
content:
## What this reference covers

The services listed here are publicly accessible web map layers that can be connected to your GIS software or web mapping project without downloading any data. They are organized by subject area and include the service URL or access point for each.

For step-by-step instructions on how to connect these services to QGIS, ArcGIS Pro, or a web mapping library, see the [Web Map Service Tutorials](#) guide.

## Elevation and hillshade

Global elevation and hillshade services for terrain analysis, relief backgrounds, and slope modeling.

| Type | Provider | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Elevation | Esri World Terrain | Multi-resolution global DEM blending national datasets with SRTM | Global, 30–90m |
| Hillshade | Esri World Hillshade | Pre-rendered greyscale hillshade for clean relief backgrounds | Global |
| Elevation | Open SRTM / Copernicus DEM | 30m and 90m global DEM for custom analysis and modelling | Global |
| Derivatives | Esri / others | Global slope surfaces derived from DEMs — degrees or percent | Global |
| Derivatives | Esri / others | Global aspect layers showing slope direction — useful for hydrology and solar studies | Global |

**QGIS XYZ connection URL for Esri World Hillshade:**
```
https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Hillshade/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}
```

**QGIS XYZ connection URL for Esri World Imagery:**
```
https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}
```

## Imagery and basemap services

Global imagery and reference maps for visual context, digitizing, and basemap backgrounds.

| Type | Provider | Description | Format |
|---|---|---|---|
| Imagery | Esri World Imagery | High-quality satellite and aerial imagery | Tiled imagery |
| Basemap | Esri World Topographic Map | Topographic-style basemap with elevation, hydrography, roads, and labels | Tiled |
| Basemap | Esri World Streets (Vector) | Vector tile streets basemap with restyling support | Vector tiles |
| Basemap | OpenStreetMap | Community-maintained global street and feature map | Tiled |
| Basemap | CartoDB Positron | Clean minimal basemap — light background | Tiled |
| Basemap | CartoDB Dark Matter | Dark variant for night-mode or high-contrast overlays | Tiled |

**CartoDB Positron URL (used in Guynode Locator):**
```
https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png
```

**CartoDB Dark Matter URL:**
```
https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png
```

## Land cover and environmental layers

Global land cover and forest change services for regional context alongside Guyana datasets.

| Type | Provider | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Land cover | ESA / others | Global land cover maps (ESA WorldCover) — forest, cropland, built-up, and more |
| Forest change | Global Forest Watch | Tree cover, forest loss, and gain — particularly relevant for Guyana's interior |

**Global Forest Watch** provides detailed forest monitoring data for the Amazon and Guiana Shield region, making it directly relevant for analysis involving Guyana's forest and environmental datasets.

## Socio-economic data services

Global population, economic, and development indicator layers for social science and policy analysis.

| Type | Provider | Description | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| Population | WorldPop | High-resolution population distribution data | 100m |
| Economic | World Bank | GDP, poverty, education, and health indicators with spatial attribution | Country level |
| Infrastructure | OpenStreetMap | Roads, buildings, land use, and points of interest | Global |

**WorldPop** population grids pair well with Guynode's administrative boundary and demographic datasets for regional population analysis.

## Climate, weather and oceans

Climate normals and ocean datasets for environmental and coastal analysis.

| Type | Provider | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Climate | WorldClim / others | Long-term climate normals — temperature, rainfall, and more |
| Oceans | NOAA / GEBCO | Global bathymetry and ocean surface layers for marine mapping and coastal studies |

## Platforms and processing engines

Major platforms that provide access to large geospatial datasets and cloud processing capabilities.

| Platform | Provider | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Google Earth Engine | Google | Planetary-scale platform for scientific analysis and visualization of geospatial datasets — petabytes of data |
| NASA Earthdata | NASA | Earth observing satellite data including MODIS, Landsat, and more — real-time and archive |
| Copernicus Data Space | European Space Agency | Free and open access to Sentinel satellite data |

**Google Earth Engine** is particularly useful for analysis involving Guyana's forest, climate, and land use data at a regional or national scale. Access requires a free account registration.

## Notes on service availability

Most Esri tile services listed here are publicly accessible without authentication for standard basemap and reference use. Some services — particularly those requiring analysis credits or organizational access — may require an ArcGIS Online account.

OpenStreetMap, CartoDB, WorldPop, and Copernicus services are fully open and do not require authentication for standard tile access.

Service URLs and availability may change. If a URL returns no tiles, check the provider's current documentation for the updated endpoint.
